description: You are logged into OpenProject at http://localhost:8080 as admin (password: Admin1234!). As a QA Analyst responsible for cross-project dependency tracking, you must document a critical dependency where the 'mobile-banking-app' project's biometric login feature requires checkout security fixes from the 'ecommerce-platform' project. In the 'mobile-banking-app' project, add a comment to the 'Implement biometric login (Face ID / Fingerprint)' work package stating: 'Blocked by ecommerce-platform checkout security fixes. Cannot deploy biometric auth until Safari checkout bug is resolved. See ecommerce-platform Sprint 1.' Change the status of this work package to 'On hold' (or to 'New' with a '[BLOCKED]' prefix added to the subject if 'On hold' is unavailable). In the 'devops-automation' project, create a new 'Task' work package with the subject 'Cross-project dependency tracking dashboard' assigned to carol.williams in 'Sprint 3 - Monitoring' with the description 'Build a dashboard to visualize cross-project work package dependencies and blockers across all three projects.' In the 'ecommerce-platform' project, set the priority of 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' to 'High'. Create a wiki page in the 'mobile-banking-app' project titled 'Cross-Project Dependencies' documenting the dependency between the biometric login feature and the ecommerce checkout fix, including both project names, work package subjects, and the blocking relationship.

metadata.checkout_wp_subject: Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari
